recent_excerpts: Vercel disclosed a breach after stolen OAuth tokens from Context.ai enabled unauthorized access to internal systems via a connected app. No customer data exposed.
Vercel identified additional compromised customer accounts linked to the Context.ai breach, expanding investigation with new indicators and network request reviews.
SANS ISC honeypots detected HTTP requests carrying X-Vercel-Set-Bypass-Cookie header, indicating active scanning for Vercel deployments vulnerable to authentication bypass.
